---
description: "Design and implement a new WPF feature for HTWind with SOLID, clean code, and Fluent UI principles."
---

Implement this feature in the HTWind repository: {{feature_request}}

Mandatory expectations:
- .NET best practices and SOLID principles
- WPF desktop app best practices (UI thread, async, resource management)
- XAML/Fluent UI best practices
- Localization compliance (`loc:Loc`)
- English-only code artifacts (identifiers, comments, and inline code strings)

Response and implementation steps:
1. Short technical plan
2. Files to change and rationale
3. Code changes
4. Build/validation result
5. Potential risks and follow-up steps
